seoDescription: Mansfield ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 13 first day, May 21 last day, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, bad weather makeup days and ICS.
calendarNotes: Mansfield ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 13, 2025 and ends on May 21, 2026. Thanksgiving Holiday Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 19-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The 2025-2026 school year does not have an official PDF URL provided here, so the PDF link is left blank while the page summarizes the district calendar dates from the available local calendar document and official calendar page.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Mansfield ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 13, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Mansfield ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Mansfield ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Thursday, May 21, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Mansfield ISD have an official PDF URL for 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No official 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided for this entry. Use the official Mansfield ISD calendars page for final verification.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
yearNumbers.detail: The first day of school is August 13, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day
yearNumbers.detail: The last day of school is May 21, 2026.
